_comment: Onboarding funnel content (EN copy) + config. Source of truth for /quiz/. Generated into quiz/index.html by buildQuizFunnel() in build.js. Token syntax: {{mocks}}/{{questions}} = build-time derived counts; {dynamic} (target_level, diagnostic_result, weak_section, daily_time, name, plan, price, interval, discount) = runtime substitution from answers; any other {placeholder} (learner_count, pass_rate, n, testimonial_1, starter_kit) renders literally — DO NOT invent values.
_mocksDisplay_comment: Mock-exam count shown in funnel copy ({{mocks}}). Marketing claim, decoupled from the real TEST_COUNT and from syncCounts (which skips /quiz/).

guarantee.headline: Pass guarantee
guarantee.short: Finish your plan and if you don't pass HSK, get a full refund.
guarantee.terms: To qualify, complete at least 90% of your assigned plan during your subscription, sit the official HSK within 60 days of finishing, and submit your official score report. Refund covers the subscription price paid. Not valid if the plan isn't completed or the official exam isn't taken.

listening.prompt: Listen to the dialogue, then choose the correct answer.

reading.prompt: Choose the word that best fills the blank.

grammar.prompt: Choose the pattern that completes the sentence.

confusable.prompt: Choose the word that fits the sentence.

bullets: Real Hanban exam papers (H41220, H41221) with original audio

s8.headline: What trips you up most?
options: Tones — I can't hear or produce them reliably
Characters (汉字) — I forget them fast
Confusable words (他/她/它, 在/再, 的/得/地)
Listening speed — natives are too fast
Running out of time on reading

s23.paymentNote: You'll be taken to our secure payment page to enter your card details.
